case_title: ROBERT TROY ELLIOTT et al VS. ROBERT GARZA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED MAR-28-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARZA, ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLIOTT, ROBERT TROY SHEPHERD, CURTIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARZA, ROBERT DOXEY, ROBERT $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
